code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000';const getAuthHeader=()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');return token?{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}:{};};export const swarmAPI={pgQuery:params=>axios.post(`${API_BASE}/swarm/pg-query`,params,{headers:getAuthHeader()}),mysqlQuery:params=>axios.post(`${API_BASE}/swarm/mysql-query`,params,{headers:getAuthHeader()}),mongoQuery:params=>axios.post(`${API_BASE}/swarm/mongo-query`,params,{headers:getAuthHeader()}),datasetQuery:params=>axios.post(`${API_BASE}/swarm/dataset-query`,params,{headers:getAuthHeader()})};
